productTitle: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE
name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE
short_description: Professional Layer 3 Etherlighting PoE+++ switch with (16) 10GbE, (8) 2.5GbE, (2) 25G SFP28 ports, 720W PoE budget, and 1.3-inch touchscreen.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE (USW-Pro-XG-24-PoE) is a professional-grade Layer 3 Etherlighting™ PoE+++ switch built for enterprise and data center environments. Featuring (16) 10 GbE ports, (8) 2.5 GbE ports, and (2) 25G SFP28 uplink ports, it provides exceptional versatility for connecting high-bandwidth servers, storage systems, and aggregation layers. With a switching capacity of 460 Gbps and non-blocking throughput of 230 Gbps, this switch ensures ultra-fast, uninterrupted data flow across every port.

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE (USW-Pro-XG-24-PoE) is a professional-grade Layer 3 Etherlighting™ PoE+++ switch built to meet the demanding requirements of modern enterprise and data center environments. Featuring (16) 10 GbE ports, (8) 2.5 GbE ports, and (2) 25G SFP28 uplink ports, it provides exceptional versatility for connecting high-bandwidth servers, storage systems, and aggregation layers. With a switching capacity of 460 Gbps and non-blocking throughput of 230 Gbps, this switch ensures ultra-fast, uninterrupted data flow across every port. The 342 Mpps forwarding rate and 8 MB packet buffer enable efficient packet handling, minimizing latency and packet loss even under heavy network loads. Supporting up to 1,000 VLANs and a MAC address table of 128,000 entries, the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE allows fine-grained network segmentation and high-performance scalability. Engineered for performance, reliability, and future-ready connectivity, it is ideal for growing professional networks.

detailed_description.heading: Functional Design
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE introduces Etherlighting™ technology, a groundbreaking feature that visually indicates port location, link speed, and VLAN or network assignment through dynamic illumination. This feature makes troubleshooting and cable management effortless, especially in dark or densely packed rack environments. When paired with UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cables, the ports achieve optimal brightness and visibility, providing a clean, professional appearance. The switch also includes a 1.3-inch color LCM touchscreen display for quick status checks, device configuration, and live monitoring without external software. Built from high-grade SGCC steel, this 1U rack-mountable switch ensures structural integrity and durability, fitting securely into four-post racks with adjustable depths between 600 and 1,066 mm. With robust ESD protection up to ±30kV (air) and ±20kV (contact), the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE is designed to perform reliably in any professional IT environment.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE is designed to deliver both robust power and advanced management features. With a total PoE budget of 720 W, all 24 RJ45 ports support PoE+++ (Type 4, up to 90 W), enabling high-wattage devices like Ubiquiti U6E, U7, or other demanding access points and switches. The switch’s internal 200 W AC/DC power supply (100–240V AC) works alongside UniFi Redundant Power System (RPS) via a USP RPS DC input to maintain uptime during power fluctuations. Under typical operation, the switch itself consumes up to 150 W (excluding PoE output), and when fully loaded, the combined power draw (switch + PoE) can reach 870 W. Management is seamless through UniFi Network version 9.0.114 and later, allowing centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates from a single intuitive interface. The switch fully supports Layer 3 networking, including static routing and inter-VLAN communication, enabling optimized data paths and reduced latency across complex infrastructures. With its powerful architecture and professional build quality, the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 PoE sets a new standard for enterprise-grade switching and reliability.
